case_title: PLOUGH ELECTRIC, INC. VS. HUMAYAN KABIR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,815.58 FILED BY PLOUGH ELECTRIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KABIR, HUMAYAN DBA SEMIFAB, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLOUGH ELECTRIC, INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KABIR, HUMAYAN DBA SEMIFAB, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED APR-15-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KABIR, HUMAYAN DBA SEMIFAB, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PLOUGH ELECTRIC, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KABIR, HUMAYAN DBA SEMIFAB, INC. $3,668.06 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,753.06, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2009 - JUDGMENT.
